landing.title: Percuro.ai
landing.description:
Combining biometric data with music therapy principles
to generate therapeutic music personalized for you

bio.title: Biometric Analysis
bio.description: Analyzes your heart rate, stress, and sleep quality to understand your current state

therapy.title: Music Therapy Principles
therapy.description: Applies ISO Principle and Entrainment to design therapeutic music

ai.title: AI Music Generation
ai.description: MusicGPT generates personalized therapeutic music in real-time for you

input.title: How are you feeling?
input.subtitle: Enter your biometric data to generate the perfect therapeutic music

camera.title: Measure Heart Rate via Camera
camera.description:
Point your forehead at the camera.
Measurement takes 30 seconds.

wearable.title: Connect Wearable Device
wearable.description: Automatically receives heart rate data from your Bluetooth device.

goals.title: Today's Goal
goals.relax_detail: Uses the ISO Principle to gradually lower your heart rate and activate the parasympathetic nervous system. Generates slow-tempo music with natural sounds to induce alpha brainwaves.
goals.focus_detail: Induces focused states with rhythms and repetitive patterns for beta wave activation. Includes binaural beats to mask background noise.
goals.sleep_detail: Uses binaural beats in the delta range (0.5–4 Hz) combined with gradually slowing melodies to gently guide you into sleep.
goals.energize_detail: Applies Entrainment technique to progressively raise your energy from its current level to the target. Upbeat rhythms and bright keys recharge your vitality.
goals.release_detail: Applies musical catharsis principles for emotional release. Reflects your current emotional state, then gradually guides toward a positive transformation.

generate.subtitle: AI is composing your personalized music

history.title: Session History
history.empty_desc: Start your first music therapy session
